final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining AI-related concepts and their relationships.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include each concept as a labeled node with definition text and visual connectors showing relationships between nodes
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with definitions and relationship lines:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a light, approachable direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketchbook surface treatment — exact line weight and paper texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all 7 concept labels: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concepts; each concept must have a short definition and at least one visible relationship connector to related concepts; layout must be readable and beginner-friendly
Avoid:
